title: This NotebookLM feature cuts my workload by 50%
summary: NotebookLM's Mind Maps feature generates visual topic hierarchies from uploaded documents, enabling users to selectively focus on relevant subtopics without reading all source material. This capability reportedly reduces workload by allowing creators to cherry-pick content aligned with their audience needs.
